title: Packit: Only create dist-git PRs for rawhide
body:
We'll only be releasing breaking changes on rawhide so dist-git PRs should only be created for rawhide.

<!--- Please read the [contributing guidelines](https://github.com/containers/container-libs/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md) before proceeding --->

comments.body: @containers/container-libs-maintainers PTAL. This can go before the #795 assuming there won't be any intermediate releases between them.
